ref_classifications.reason: 正文原文引用 Fig. 6.28，但第 6 章原書圖號只到 FIG. 6.27；此處語境是在引用 CO2 laser pumping efficiency / pump channels，對應的是鄰近既有 FIG. 6.27，原書不存在 FIG. 6.28 可供 catalog 對應。
ref_classifications.evidence: raw_pdfs/svelto_lasers.pdf page 282 contains 'see Fig. 6.28'; raw PDF page 263 contains FIG. 6.27 caption and Chapter 6 conclusion follows immediately after, with no FIG. 6.28 caption found in raw-PDF text search.
